case_title: JOHN WONG VS. JW GLOBAL INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY WONG, JOHN AS TO DEFENDANT JW GLOBAL INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-14-2022 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT JW GLOBAL INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-14-2022 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF JOHN WONG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JW GLOBAL INC, REPRESENTED BY BO WANG, OWNER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE. ALL PARTIES STIPULATE TO JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID FLEISIG HEARING TODAY'S MATTER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WONG, JOHN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JW GLOBAL INC. $4,168.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,243.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) BO WANG, FILED BY DEFENDANT JW GLOBAL INC.
